case_title: ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. CHRISTOPHER SWAN et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST MOSHE SELIKOVITZ, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-26-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-10-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARIA LERTORA CSR# 11935 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-04-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: LOEB, STEVEN S SUBSTITUTED FOR SELIKOVITZ, MOSHE AS ATTORNEY FOR ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT SWAN, CHRISTOPHER AN INDIVIDUAL

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SWAN, CHRISTOPHER AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2008
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-26-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC SERVED JUL-26-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SWAN, CHRISTOPHER AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-26-2009 CONTINUED TO NOV-04-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR OBJECTION FILED, THE COURT ORDERED CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-04-2009 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor objection filed, the court ordered the case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Continued To Nov-04-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 11/04/2009 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Maria Lertora CSR# 11935 (212)
